message:
fix(freeze): proper reference counting for stack/local operations

- dup: increment refcount for ref types (prevents double-free)
- drop: decrement refcount for ref types (prevents leaks)
- get_loc: dup ref types when reading from locals
- put_loc: free old value before overwriting locals
- set_loc: dup to local, free old value
- strictEq: use JS_IsStrictEqual for correct string comparison

Fixes heap corruption in frozen tsc causing "pointer being freed
was not allocated" crashes. tsc --version and --help now work.
